payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Rectangular, wall-mounted picture frame with a dark brown wooden moulding and thin gold inner trim containing a muted seascape of sailboats; image captured at an angled perspective with the left edge near the crop boundary and slight surface gloss visible — estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.
